calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
Cheri Gorman, litigation specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Keith Winemiller.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Keith Winemiller as follows:

Damages/Principal - $47,995.16.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,287.99.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $423.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $50,706.15.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Continued To Oct-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
